content.hero-statement: 7+ years at the intersection of environmental science and industrial compliance — driven by curiosity, precision, and a genuine love for the work.
content.about-lead: I'm a Senior Environmental Analyst with over seven years of experience in air quality monitoring and pollutant analysis.
content.about-body: Specializing in industrial emissions and ambient air assessment, I apply rigorous analytical methodologies to deliver data that withstands regulatory scrutiny. My work spans the full measurement lifecycle — from instrument calibration and sample collection through laboratory analysis, quality assurance, and compliance reporting.
content.exp-d-1: Industrial stack emissions and ambient air assessment across regulated and unregulated pollutant classes.
content.exp-d-2: Quantitative detection of aldehydes, phenols, hydrogen chloride, and volatile organic compounds.
content.exp-d-3: Trace-level identification of metals and volatile compounds using validated laboratory instrumentation.
content.exp-d-4: Data integrity assurance, QA/QC protocols, and compliance reporting to environmental regulatory standards.
content.mth-f-1: ICP-OES — Inductively Coupled Plasma Optical Emission Spectroscopy
content.mth-d-1: Multi-element trace metal analysis in aqueous and digested environmental matrices.
content.mth-d-2: Separation and quantification of volatile and semi-volatile organic compounds.
content.mth-d-3: Single-element determination of metals at trace and ultra-trace concentrations.
content.mth-d-4: Definitive identification and quantification of complex organic mixtures and unknowns.
content.con-lead: Available for professional opportunities and collaboration.
content.con-sub: Reach out via LinkedIn to discuss projects or just to say hi!
content.pro-lead: Over seven years spent at the boundary of science and industrial accountability.
content.pro-body-1: I've built my career around measuring what can't be seen. Working across industrial sites and ambient monitoring networks, I use validated methods to detect pollutants — aldehydes, phenols, hydrogen chloride, VOCs, trace metals — trace them to their source, and check the results against environmental standards. I work with ICP, GC, AA, and GC-MS instruments, and a lot of what I do comes down to patience: noticing faint signals and making sure what I report holds up.
content.pro-body-2: I think good analytical work is quieter than people expect. It's less about big findings and more about doing the small things carefully, every time, so the data can be trusted. That care is the part I value most.
content.p-baseball-body: An avid lover of the baseball team, LG Twins, I attend and follow every game whenever the schedule allows. I believe I was born to be their follower.
content.p-travel-body: Seeing the world helps me see myself better. Discovering new cultures and landscapes around the world is not just travel: it's an exploration to me.
